cards.name: The Fool
cards.upright: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, a free spirit. Fresh starts and the very beginning of the journey.
cards.reversed: Recklessness, naive, foolish choices, risk without consideration.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.upright: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power, inspired action. Turning ideas into reality through willpower and skill.
cards.reversed: Manipulation, poor planning, untapped talents, misuse of skills.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.upright: Intuition, unconscious knowledge, divine feminine, inner voice. Deep wisdom and mystery.
cards.reversed: Secrets withheld, repressed intuition, disconnected from inner voice.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.upright: Femininity, abundance, nurturing, creativity, nature. Fertility in all forms - creative, physical, emotional.
cards.reversed: Creative block, dependence on others, smothering love, neglect of self.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.upright: Authority, establishment, structure, father figure, discipline. Leadership and control.
cards.reversed: Tyranny, rigidity, excessive control, lack of discipline.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.upright: Spiritual wisdom, tradition, conformity, morality, ethics. Sacred teachings and guidance.
cards.reversed: Personal beliefs, freedom, new approaches, challenging tradition.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.upright: Love, harmony, relationships, choices, values alignment. Deep connections and important life choices.
cards.reversed: Disharmony, imbalance, misaligned values, relationship issues.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.upright: Direction, control, willpower, triumph, ambition. Victory through determination and focus.
cards.reversed: Lack of direction, aggression, impulsiveness, defeat.

cards.name: Strength
cards.upright: Courage, patience, inner strength, compassion, resilience. Quiet power and overcoming challenges through gentleness.
cards.reversed: Self-doubt, fear, lack of discipline, inner turmoil.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.upright: Soul searching, introspection, inner guidance, solitude. Deep contemplation and spiritual seeking.
cards.reversed: Isolation, loneliness, avoidance, lack of introspection.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.upright: Change, cycles, fate, turning points, good luck. The cyclical nature of life and inevitability of change.
cards.reversed: Bad luck, resistance to change, clinging to past, stagnation.

cards.name: Justice
cards.upright: Fairness, truth, cause and effect, law, balance. Karmic balance and integrity.
cards.reversed: Dishonesty, unfairness, imbalance, lack of accountability.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.upright: Surrender, letting go, new perspective, sacrifice, patience. Gaining wisdom through surrender.
cards.reversed: Stalling, resistance, fear of sacrifice, avoidance.

cards.name: Death
cards.upright: Endings, transformation, transition, renewal, change. End of a cycle and beginning of something new.
cards.reversed: Resistance to change, fear of endings, stagnation, decay.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.upright: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose, harmony. Finding the middle path and integration.
cards.reversed: Imbalance, excess, impatience, discord, recklessness.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.upright: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, materialism, bondage. Being bound by unhealthy patterns.
cards.reversed: Release, freedom, breaking bonds, reclaiming power.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.upright: Sudden change, revelation, awakening, chaos, breakdown. Upheaval that shatters illusions.
cards.reversed: Avoidance of disaster, fear of change, resistance to awakening.

cards.name: The Star
cards.upright: Hope, inspiration, serenity, faith, healing, purpose. Renewed hope and spiritual connection.
cards.reversed: Disconnection, despair, hopelessness, faithlessness.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.upright: Illusion, intuition, dreams, subconscious, mystery, anxiety. Realm of dreams and hidden truths.
cards.reversed: Confusion, illusion, anxiety, fear, repressed emotions.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.upright: Joy, success, celebration, vitality, positivity, achievement. Success and happiness.
cards.reversed: Negativity, sadness, depression, pessimism, delay.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.upright: Rebirth, awakening, forgiveness, absolution, inner calling. Self-evaluation and spiritual awakening.
cards.reversed: Self-doubt, resistance to growth, ignoring the call, regret.

cards.name: The World
cards.upright: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel, wholeness. Successful completion of a cycle.
cards.reversed: Incompletion, delay, lack of closure, stagnation.

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.upright: New emotional experiences, love, compassion, creativity, divine love. New opportunities for love and emotional growth.
cards.reversed: Blocked emotions, lack of compassion, emotional imbalance, emptiness.

cards.name: Two of Cups
cards.upright: Partnerships, harmony, relationships, balance, mutual attraction. Harmony, love, and deep emotional bonds.
cards.reversed: Imbalance, disharmony, broken relationships, misunderstanding.

cards.name: Three of Cups
cards.upright: Celebration, friendship, community, creativity, collaboration. Joy, celebration, and social connections.
cards.reversed: Isolation, overindulgence, gossip, disconnection.

cards.name: Four of Cups
cards.upright: Apathy, contemplation, boredom, re-evaluation, withdrawal. Period of introspection and dissatisfaction.
cards.reversed: New perspective, engagement, acceptance, opportunity.

cards.name: Five of Cups
cards.upright: Loss, disappointment, regret, focus on negative, grief. Dwelling on past disappointments and losses.
cards.reversed: Acceptance, moving on, healing, seeing the positive.

cards.name: Six of Cups
cards.upright: Nostalgia, childhood, memories, innocence, past influences. Revisiting the past and reconnecting.
cards.reversed: Stuck in past, inability to move forward, unrealistic nostalgia.

cards.name: Seven of Cups
cards.upright: Choices, fantasy, options, illusions, decision-making. Multiple options and possibilities.
cards.reversed: Clarity, decision, reality, focus, determination.

cards.name: Eight of Cups
cards.upright: Departure, leaving behind, walking away, seeking deeper meaning. Leaving situations that no longer fulfill.
cards.reversed: Abandonment, aimless wandering, staying when should leave.

cards.name: Nine of Cups
cards.upright: Satisfaction, contentment, wish fulfillment, comfort, success. Emotional fulfillment and satisfaction.
cards.reversed: Dissatisfaction, greed, materialism, disappointment, complacency.

cards.name: Ten of Cups
cards.upright: Harmony, family, happiness, fulfillment, emotional success. Complete emotional fulfillment and harmonious relationships.
cards.reversed: Disharmony, broken family, misaligned values, unhappiness.

cards.name: Page of Cups
cards.upright: Creative ideas, intuition, messages, gentle spirit, new emotional insights.
cards.reversed: Neglect, distraction, bad news, lack of emotional maturity.

cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.upright: Romance, charm, creativity, emotional invitations, sensitive approach.
cards.reversed: Unrealistic expectations, moodiness, broken promises, emotional immaturity.

cards.name: Queen of Cups
cards.upright: Compassion, intuition, empathy, emotional mastery, nurturing spirit.
cards.reversed: Emotional insecurity, co-dependency, moodiness, victim mentality.

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.upright: Emotional balance, wisdom, compassion, diplomacy, mastery of emotions.
cards.reversed: Emotional manipulation, repressed feelings, volatile moods, passive aggression.

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.upright: New opportunities, prosperity, manifestation, abundance, grounding. New beginnings in material and financial matters.
cards.reversed: Lost opportunity, lack, delay, impracticality, waste.

cards.name: Two of Pentacles
cards.upright: Balance, adaptability, juggling priorities, flexibility, decisions. Managing multiple responsibilities.
cards.reversed: Imbalance, overwhelm, disorganization, poor decisions, rigidity.

cards.name: Three of Pentacles
cards.upright: Teamwork, collaboration, skill, mastery, apprenticeship. Working together toward a common goal.
cards.reversed: Lack of teamwork, poor planning, disorganization, mediocrity.

cards.name: Four of Pentacles
cards.upright: Control, security, stability, possessiveness, conservation. Holding on to resources and seeking security.
cards.reversed: Greed, lack of control, instability, materialism, fear.

cards.name: Five of Pentacles
cards.upright: Hardship, poverty, isolation, lack, struggle, need. Material hardship and feeling left out.
cards.reversed: Recovery, improvement, support, moving past hardship.

cards.name: Six of Pentacles
cards.upright: Generosity, charity, sharing, balance, giving and receiving. Flow of resources and sharing abundance.
cards.reversed: Selfishness, greed, one-sided giving, inequality, exploitation.

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.upright: Assessment, patience, growth, perseverance, long-term thinking. Evaluating progress and investing for the future.
cards.reversed: Lack of growth, poor investments, impatience, quitting.

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.upright: Mastery, dedication, skill development, craftsmanship, detail. Commitment to excellence and continuous improvement.
cards.reversed: Lack of quality, poor workmanship, disinterest, haste.

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.upright: Independence, luxury, self-sufficiency, success, enjoyment. Enjoying the fruits of your labor in solitude.
cards.reversed: Dependence, lack, waste, imbalance, financial concerns.

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.upright: Legacy, inheritance, family, tradition, long-term success. Wealth that benefits future generations.
cards.reversed: Family conflict, financial failure, lack of tradition, instability.

cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.upright: Ambition, studiousness, grounded intuition, manifestation, diligence in study/work.
cards.reversed: Lack of progress, distraction, unreliability, poor planning.

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.upright: Reliability, routine, productivity, methodical progress, steady effort.
cards.reversed: Lack of progress, laziness, carelessness, poor execution, rigidity.

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.upright: Practicality, nurturing, abundance, domestic harmony, grounded wisdom.
cards.reversed: Imbalance, poor planning, greed, materialism, neglecting self.

cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.upright: Wealth, abundance, security, prosperity, mastery of material world. Generosity.
cards.reversed: Materialism, greed, miserly, unbalanced, poor financial decisions.

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.upright: Breakthrough, clarity, mental power, truth, new ideas. Intellectual clarity and breakthrough moments.
cards.reversed: Confusion, lack of clarity, indecision, poor communication.

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.upright: Indecision, stalemate, truce, difficult choices, avoidance. Being stuck between two choices.
cards.reversed: Releasing stalemate, decision, gaining clarity, choice.

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.upright: Heartbreak, sorrow, betrayal, separation, grief, pain. Deep emotional pain and heartbreak.
cards.reversed: Healing, forgiveness, release, moving on, therapy.

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.upright: Rest, meditation, recuperation, contemplation, retreat. Need for rest and mental recovery.
cards.reversed: Restlessness, burnout, ignoring need for rest, hyperactivity.

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.upright: Conflict, defeat, betrayal, argument, ego, dishonesty. Conflict and winning at any cost.
cards.reversed: Reconciliation, forgiveness, learning, moving past conflict.

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.upright: Transition, change, rite of passage, journey, healing. Moving from difficult times to calmer waters.
cards.reversed: Stagnation, resistance to change, inability to move forward.

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.upright: Deception, strategy, stealth, cunning, cleverness, lies. Using cunning or avoiding confrontation.
cards.reversed: Coming clean, honesty, strategy working, redemption.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.upright: Restriction, feeling trapped, victim mentality, self-limitation. Feeling trapped by your own beliefs.
cards.reversed: Freedom, release, new perspective, empowerment, liberation.

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.upright: Anxiety, worry, nightmares, fear, depression, guilt. Mental anguish and worst-case thinking.
cards.reversed: Healing, hope, therapy, release, peace of mind.

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.upright: Endings, betrayal, painful conclusion, rock bottom, crisis. End of a painful cycle.
cards.reversed: Recovery, healing, renewal hope, regeneration, avoiding disaster.

cards.name: Page of Swords
cards.upright: Curiosity, mental agility, investigation, truth-seeking, messenger.
cards.reversed: Gossip, scattered focus, impulsiveness, careless words.

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.upright: Action, speed, decisiveness, truth-telling, directness, hasty movement.
cards.reversed: Rashness, impulsiveness, recklessness, lack of planning, thoughtless words.

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.upright: Intellectual clarity, independence, truth, directness, mental strength, boundaries.
cards.reversed: Bitterness, cynicism, cruelty, harsh judgment, isolation.

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.upright: Intellectual authority, truth, clarity, decisiveness, justice, objective judgment.
cards.reversed: Manipulation, cruelty, harshness, abuse of power, lack of compassion.

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.upright: Inspiration, new beginnings, potential, creativity, passion, seed. Spark of new ideas and creative potential.
cards.reversed: Lack of inspiration, delays, creative block, inaction.

cards.name: Two of Wands
cards.upright: Planning, decisions, progress, personal goals, discovery, expansion. Planning for the future and expanding horizons.
cards.reversed: Fear of unknown, lack of planning, obstacles, delays, stagnation.

cards.name: Three of Wands
cards.upright: Expansion, exploration, foresight, trade, leadership, vision. Looking toward the future with optimism.
cards.reversed: Lack of foresight, delays, obstacles to expansion, pessimism.

cards.name: Four of Wands
cards.upright: Celebration, harmony, community, home, stability, foundation. Joy, celebration, and harmonious gatherings.
cards.reversed: Lack of celebration, tension, instability, disharmony.

cards.name: Five of Wands
cards.upright: Competition, conflict, disagreement, chaos, tension, struggle. Healthy competition for growth.
cards.reversed: Avoidance of conflict, lack of competition, apathy, truce.

cards.name: Six of Wands
cards.upright: Victory, success, recognition, progress, self-confidence. Public recognition and triumph.
cards.reversed: Lack of confidence, failure, private defeat, egotism.

cards.name: Seven of Wands
cards.upright: Challenge, perseverance, defense, standing ground, courage. Defending your position.
cards.reversed: Giving up, overwhelmed, quitting, lack of conviction.

cards.name: Eight of Wands
cards.upright: Movement, messages, travel, rapid change, swift action. Swift movement and rapid progress.
cards.reversed: Delays, cancellations, slow progress, lack of movement.

cards.name: Nine of Wands
cards.upright: Resilience, persistence, defense, last stand, courage. Standing strong despite challenges.
cards.reversed: Cowardice, surrender, giving up, exhaustion, doubt.

cards.name: Ten of Wands
cards.upright: Burden, responsibility, stress, hard work, overload. Taking on too much responsibility.
cards.reversed: Releasing burden, delegation, sharing load, relief.

cards.name: Page of Wands
cards.upright: Exploration, discovery, energetic beginnings, new inspiration, adventurous spirit.
cards.reversed: Lack of direction, pessimism, delays, new ideas that fail to launch.

cards.name: Knight of Wands
cards.upright: Adventure, energy, passion, impulsiveness, travel, quick action, spontaneity.
cards.reversed: Recklessness, rushed decisions, lack of direction, broken promises.

cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.upright: Vibrant energy, creativity, enthusiasm, joy, generosity, natural leadership, confidence.
cards.reversed: Selfishness, drama, volatility, creative block, exhaustion.

cards.name: King of Wands
cards.upright: Visionary leadership, big picture thinking, inspiration, wisdom, experience, entrepreneurship.
cards.reversed: Impulsiveness, haste, ruthless behavior, tyrannical, burnout.
